Openlearnia

Tools Learn About GitHub

Live Wallpaper

Video, slideshow, and HTML wallpapers behind your desktop icons.

Platform: Windows 10 / 11

Source: https://github.com/openlearnia/live-wallpaper

Downloads: GitHub Releases (MSI + portable)

Features

  • Video, image slideshow, and HTML/WebView2 wallpapers
  • Multi-monitor support and per-display playlists
  • Power profiles, tray controls, and global hotkeys

© 2026 Openlearnia
